form.formComment: 11-year-old gelding showed improvement last time. 3rd (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, beaten 13 m by Mr Pnut (1:54.20) in NW1500L4 on March 29 at $90.90. The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into seventh behind Brady To Gronk at this track over 1609m in a NW1500L4 on March 25 at $24.20. Form reads okay, but out of his depth.
